message:
feat(connectors): implement ConnectorErrorMapping for notion, sendgrid,
sentry and add fcp-sdk dep to google-ai, homeassistant, kubernetes

Continue the systematic ConnectorErrorMapping trait adoption:

New trait implementations (notion, sendgrid, sentry):
- from_async_error: maps Timeout→408, Cancelled→status 0/None,
  other variants→to_string with appropriate error types
- Delegates to_fcp_error/is_retryable/retry_after to existing
  inherent methods using Self::

Dependency-only additions (google-ai, homeassistant, kubernetes):
- Add fcp-sdk dep to Cargo.toml in preparation for upcoming
  ConnectorErrorMapping implementations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
